title: Fix Karigar Mapping: Dynamic Resolution via design_code → master_design

requirements.summary: Establish a single source of truth for karigar resolution: at render time, always derive karigar_name by looking up order.design_code in the master_design mappings, never from any stored karigar field on the order record itself.
acceptanceCriteria: No component reads karigar_name directly from the order record for display, filtering, or grouping purposes.
Karigar is always resolved by looking up the order's design_code in the master design map at render time.
Updating karigar in Master Design causes all affected views to reflect the new karigar without requiring an order record mutation or page reload.

file_operations.description: Add a new hook useKarigarResolver that returns a function (order: Order) => string which looks up order.design in the master design mappings and returns the resolved karigar_name or 'Unassigned' if no mapping exists. This hook depends on useDesignMappings query and always returns the latest master design data.

Create a utility function resolveKarigar(designCode: string, mappings: Map<string, DesignMapping>) => string that performs the lookup logic. Returns the karigar name from the mapping or 'Unassigned' if the design code is not found. This utility is used by the useKarigarResolver hook and can be imported directly where needed.

requirements.summary: Fix the Total Orders tab (TotalOrdersTab.tsx) so that karigar display and karigar-based filtering both use the dynamically resolved karigar (from master_design lookup), not any cached or stored karigar value on the order.
acceptanceCriteria: After updating karigar in Master Design, Total Orders tab shows affected orders under the new karigar without any manual refresh of order records.
Karigar filter in Total Orders tab resolves against the dynamic karigar lookup, not stored order data.
No order appears under both old and new karigar simultaneously.
No order disappears from the tab after a karigar update.

file_operations.description: Replace all usage of order.karigarName with the useKarigarResolver hook. Update the karigar filter logic to resolve karigar names dynamically at filter time using resolveKarigar. Ensure grouping, display, and filtering all use the resolved karigar from master_design mappings. Remove any references to stored order.karigarName field in display, filtering, or grouping logic.

requirements.summary: Fix the Karigar tab (KarigarsTab.tsx and KarigarDetail.tsx) so that orders are grouped by dynamically resolved karigar from Master Design. When karigar changes in Master Design, orders must automatically move to the new karigar group.
acceptanceCriteria: Karigar tab groups orders by dynamically resolved karigar_name from master_design, not from any stored order field.
After a karigar change in Master Design, the affected order appears under the new karigar group in the Karigar tab.
The affected order no longer appears under the old karigar group.
No order is lost or duplicated in the Karigar tab after a karigar update.

file_operations.description: Replace all usage of order.karigarName with the useKarigarResolver hook to derive karigar names at render time. Update the grouping logic to group orders by resolved karigar_name from master_design mappings. Ensure that the karigar list and order counts reflect the dynamically resolved karigar, including the 'Unassigned' group for orders with missing design codes.

Replace all usage of order.karigarName with the useKarigarResolver hook. Filter orders for the current karigar by comparing the resolved karigar_name (from master_design lookup) with the karigar route parameter. Ensure display and selection logic use the resolved karigar, not stored order fields.

requirements.summary: Handle the edge case where an order has a design_code that does not exist in Master Design: display karigar as 'Unassigned' for such orders without crashing the UI or breaking grouping logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Orders with a design_code not found in master_design display 'Unassigned' as their karigar in all tabs.
The 'Unassigned' group is rendered correctly in the Karigar tab without crashing.
No runtime errors are thrown when a design_code has no matching master_design entry.
Total Orders tab and all filters handle 'Unassigned' karigar gracefully.

file_operations.description: Ensure the resolveKarigar function safely returns 'Unassigned' when the design code is missing from the mappings or when the mapping exists but karigarName is empty/null. Add defensive null checks to prevent runtime errors.

Ensure the 'Unassigned' karigar group is rendered alongside other karigar groups. Test that orders with missing design codes appear under 'Unassigned' and do not cause rendering errors or break the grouping logic.

Ensure the karigar filter includes 'Unassigned' as a valid filter option and that orders with unresolved design codes are correctly included when 'Unassigned' is selected. Verify no crashes occur when filtering or displaying these orders.

Ensure the KarigarDetail page can handle the 'Unassigned' karigar route parameter and correctly displays orders with missing design codes. Verify no runtime errors occur when viewing the 'Unassigned' group.
